summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Pacer Lunt Large Cap Alternator ETF (ALTL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index that alternates exposure between low volatility and high-beta US stocks, weighted by momentum. ALTL was launched on Jun 24, 2020 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Lunt Capital US Large Cap Equity Rotation Total Return

holdings.infoBox: ALTL is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Robinhood Markets stock at 2.25%, Sandisk at 1.88%, Micron Technology at 1.73%, Applied Materials at 1.53%, and Lam Research at 1.51%.
